creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
This does work. Note that the vulnerability-test-date has a dynamic
version depending on INSTALLATION_DATE. You submitted this PR on Jan 17.
The port you have installed is "2013.01.07".

The vuln spec specifies that it is not vuln!

> vulnerability-test-port>=2000<2013.01.17|http://cvsweb.freebsd.org/ports/security/vulnerability-test-port/|Not vulnerable, just a test port (database: 2013-01-17)

Note that '<2013.01.07'

It would have shown up vulnerable the next day.

I get the same behavior without setting INSTALLATION_DATE on both
pkg_install and pkgng. It shows as not vulnerable.

However, setting INSTALLATION_DATE into the past does work:

> # make -C ~bryan/freebsd/ports/ports-mgmt/vulnerability-test-port install clean INSTALLATION_DATE=2004.01.25
> ===>  vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25 has known vulnerabilities:
> vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25 is vulnerable:
> Not vulnerable, just a test port (database: 2013-03-30)
> 
> WWW: http://cvsweb.freebsd.org/ports/security/vulnerability-test-port/
> => Please update your ports tree and try again.
> *** [check-vulnerable] Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /usr/home/bryan/freebsd/ports/ports-mgmt/vulnerability-test-port.

> # make -C ~bryan/freebsd/ports/ports-mgmt/vulnerability-test-port install clean INSTALLATION_DATE=2004.01.25 DISABLE_VULNERABILITIES=1
> ===>   vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
> ===> Fetching all distfiles required by vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25 for building
> ===>  Extracting for vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25
> ===>  Patching for vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25
> ===>  Configuring for vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25
> ===>  Installing for vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25
> ===>   Generating temporary packing list
> ===>  Checking if ports-mgmt/vulnerability-test-port already installed
> ===>   Registering installation for vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25
> Installing vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25... done
> ===>  Cleaning for vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25

> # pkg audit
> vulnerability-test-port-2004.01.25 is vulnerable:
> Not vulnerable, just a test port (database: 2013-03-30)
> 
> WWW: http://cvsweb.freebsd.org/ports/security/vulnerability-test-port/
> 
> 1 problem(s) in your installed packages found.

Tested with pkg-1.0.10

-- 
Regards,
Bryan Drewery
bdrewery@freenode/EFNet
